def solve(s)
  n = s.length
  prefix_L = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
  prefix_C = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
  prefix_T = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
  
  (0...n).each do |i|
    prefix_L[i+1] = prefix_L[i] + (s[i] == 'L' ? 1 : 0)
    prefix_C[i+1] = prefix_C[i] + (s[i] == 'C' ? 1 : 0)
    prefix_T[i+1] = prefix_T[i] + (s[i] == 'T' ? 1 : 0)
  end
  
  suffix_T = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
  (n-1).downto(0) do |i|
    suffix_T[i] = suffix_T[i+1] + (s[i] == 'T' ? 1 : 0)
  end
  
  sum_C_T = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
  (n-1).downto(0) do |i|
    if s[i] == 'C'
      sum_C_T[i] = suffix_T[i+1] + sum_C_T[i+1]
    else
      sum_C_T[i] = sum_C_T[i+1]
    end
  end
  
  original_count = 0
  (0...n).each do |j|
    if s[j] == 'C'
      original_count += prefix_L[j] * suffix_T[j+1]
    end
  end
  
  max_insert_L = 0
  (0...n+1).each do |i|
    max_insert_L = [max_insert_L, sum_C_T[i]].max
  end
  
  max_insert_C = 0
  (0...n+1).each do |i|
    current = prefix_L[i] * suffix_T[i]
    max_insert_C = [max_insert_C, current].max
  end
  
  max_insert_T = 0
  (0...n+1).each do |i|
    current = prefix_L[i] * prefix_C[i]
    max_insert_T = [max_insert_T, current].max
  end
  
  max_gain = [max_insert_L, max_insert_C, max_insert_T].max
  result = original_count + [max_gain, 0].max
  result
end

def solve(s)
  n = s.length
  # Compute prefix_L, prefix_C, prefix_T
  prefix_L = Array.new(n+1, 0)
  prefix_C = Array.new(n+1, 0)
  prefix_T = Array.new(n+1, 0)
  for i in 0..n-1
    prefix_L[i+1] = prefix_L[i] + (s[i] == 'L' ? 1 : 0)
    prefix_C[i+1] = prefix_C[i] + (s[i] == 'C' ? 1 : 0)
    prefix_T[i+1] = prefix_T[i] + (s[i] == 'T' ? 1 : 0)
  end

  # Compute suffix_T
  suffix_T = Array.new(n+1, 0)
  for i in n-1 downto 0
    suffix_T[i] = suffix_T[i+1] + (s[i] == 'T' ? 1 : 0)
  end

  # Compute sum_C_T
  sum_C_T = Array.new(n+1, 0)
  for i in n-1 downto 0
    if s[i] == 'C'
      sum_C_T[i] = suffix_T[i+1] + sum_C_T[i+1]
    else
      sum_C_T[i] = sum_C_T[i+1]
    end
  end

  # Compute original_count
  original_count = 0
  for j in 0..n-1
    if s[j] == 'C'
      original_count += prefix_L[j] * suffix_T[j+1]
    end
  end

  # Compute max_insert_L
  max_insert_L = 0
  for i in 0..n
    current = sum_C_T[i]
    max_insert_L = [max_insert_L, current].max
  end

  # Compute max_insert_C
  max_insert_C = 0
  for i in 0..n
    current = prefix_L[i] * suffix_T[i]
    max_insert_C = [max_insert_C, current].max
  end

  # Compute max_insert_T
  max_insert_T = 0
  for i in 0..n
    current = prefix_L[i] * prefix_C[i]
    max_insert_T = [max_insert_T, current].max
  end

  max_gain = [max_insert_L, max_insert_C, max_insert_T].max
  result = original_count + [max_gain, 0].max
  return result
end

```ruby
def solve(s)
  n = s.length
  prefix_L = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
  prefix_C = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
  prefix_T = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
  
  (0...n).each do |i|
    prefix_L[i+1] = prefix_L[i] + (s[i] == 'L' ? 1 : 0)
    prefix_C[i+1] = prefix_C[i] + (s[i] == 'C' ? 1 : 0)
    prefix_T[i+1] = prefix_T[i] + (s[i] == 'T' ? 1 : 0)
  end
  
  suffix_T = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
  (n-1).downto(0) do |i|
    suffix_T[i] = suffix_T[i+1] + (s[i] == 'T' ? 1 : 0)
  end
  
  sum_C_T = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
  (n-1).downto(0) do |i|
    if s[i] == 'C'
      sum_C_T[i] = suffix_T[i+1] + sum_C_T[i+1]
    else
      sum_C_T[i] = sum_C_T[i+1]
    end
  end
  
  original_count = 0
  (0...n).each do |j|
    if s[j] == 'C'
      original_count += prefix_L[j] * suffix_T[j+1]
    end
  end
  
  max_insert_L = 0
  (0...n+1).each do |i|
    max_insert_L = [max_insert_L, sum_C_T[i]].max
  end
  
  max_insert_C = 0
  (0...n+1).each do |i|
    current = prefix_L[i] * suffix_T[i]
    max_insert_C = [max_insert_C, current].max
  end
  
  max_insert_T = 0
  (0...n+1).each do |i|
    current = prefix_L[i] * prefix_C[i]
    max_insert_T = [max_insert_T, current].max
  end
  
  max_gain = [max_insert_L, max_insert_C, max_insert_T].max
  result = original_count + [max_gain, 0].max
  result
end

def solve(s)
  n = s.length
  # Compute prefix_L, prefix_C, prefix_T
  prefix_L = Array.new(n+1, 0)
  prefix_C = Array.new(n+1, 0)
  prefix_T = Array.new(n+1, 0)
  for i in 0..n-1
    prefix_L[i+1] = prefix_L[i] + (s[i] == 'L' ? 1 : 0)
    prefix_C[i+1] = prefix_C[i] + (s[i] == 'C' ? 1 : 0)
    prefix_T[i+1] = prefix_T[i] + (s[i] == 'T' ? 1 : 0)
  end

  # Compute suffix_T
  suffix_T = Array.new(n+1, 0)
  for i in n-1 downto 0
    suffix_T[i] = suffix_T[i+1] + (s[i] == 'T' ? 1 : 0)
  end

  # Compute sum_C_T
  sum_C_T = Array.new(n+1, 0)
  for i in n-1 downto 0
    if s[i] == 'C'
      sum_C_T[i] = suffix_T[i+1] + sum_C_T[i+1]
    else
      sum_C_T[i] = sum_C_T[i+1]
    end
  end

  # Compute original_count
  original_count = 0
  for j in 0..n-1
    if s[j] == 'C'
      original_count += prefix_L[j] * suffix_T[j+1]
    end
  end

  # Compute max_insert_L
  max_insert_L = 0
  for i in 0..n
    current = sum_C_T[i]
    max_insert_L = [max_insert_L, current].max
  end

  # Compute max_insert_C
  max_insert_C = 0
  for i in 0..n
    current = prefix_L[i] * suffix_T[i]
    max_insert_C = [max_insert_C, current].max
  end

  # Compute max_insert_T
  max_insert_T = 0
  for i in 0..n
    current = prefix_L[i] * prefix_C[i]
    max_insert_T = [max_insert_T, current].max
  end

  max_gain = [max_insert_L, max_insert_C, max_insert_T].max
  result = original_count + [max_gain, 0].max
  return result
end

def solve(s)
  n = s.length
  prefix_L = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
  prefix_C = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
  prefix_T = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
  
  (0...n).each do |i|
    prefix_L[i+1] = prefix_L[i] + (s[i] == 'L' ? 1 : 0)
    prefix_C[i+1] = prefix_C[i] + (s[i] == 'C' ? 1 : 0)
    prefix_T[i+1] = prefix_T[i] + (s[i] == 'T' ? 1 : 0)
  end
  
  suffix_T = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
  (n-1).downto(0) do |i|
    suffix_T[i] = suffix_T[i+1] + (s[i] == 'T' ? 1 : 0)
  end
  
  sum_C_T = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
  (n-1).downto(0) do |i|
    if s[i] == 'C'
      sum_C_T[i] = suffix_T[i+1] + sum_C_T[i+1]
    else
      sum_C_T[i] = sum_C_T[i+1]
    end
  end
  
  original_count = 0
  (0...n).each do |j|
    if s[j] == 'C'
      original_count += prefix_L[j] * suffix_T[j+1]
    end
  end
  
  max_insert_L = 0
  (0...n+1).each do |i|
    max_insert_L = [max_insert_L, sum_C_T[i]].max
  end
  
  max_insert_C = 0
  (0...n+1).each do |i|
    current = prefix_L[i] * suffix_T[i]
    max_insert_C = [max_insert_C, current].max
  end
  
  max_insert_T = 0
  (0...n+1).each do |i|
    current = prefix_L[i] * prefix_C[i]
    max_insert_T = [max_insert_T, current].max
  end
  
  max_gain = [max_insert_L, max_insert_C, max_insert_T].max
  result = original_count + [max_gain, 0].max
  result
end
